item.name: Grade 4 Artisanal Skybuilders' Silex
item.description:
Similarâ”€though rather less artisanalâ”€sacks of silex are sold to the participants in Ul'dah's Coliseum. A well-aimed handful of the stuff can temporarily blind the opponent, though it is only a matter of time until these customers realize that the same is true of the sand that lines the arena floor, which is available for free.

Used in expert crafting recipes.
